entries.title: 🔧 Build Positions Locked In
entries.body: Big one: your buildings now save and load at the EXACT spot you placed them. No more 'I built it there, came back, it's clipping into other props' — that bug is dead. Old saves with duplicate buildings get an automatic cleanup pass with refunds to inventory.

entries.title: 🎨 Decorate Freely
entries.body: Decorations (flags, statues, signs, props) can now sit close together or stacked on top of other decor. Cluster them, layer them, go full interior designer mode. Buildings still respect clearance — but your aesthetic flex is unblocked.

entries.title: 👋 Hey, you're awesome
entries.body:
Real talk: you're already cooler than 95% of players just for reading patch notes 😎

This game is built FOR you. Found a bug? Got a wild idea for a new feature? Tap the 💬 FEEDBACK button on the LEFT side of your screen — every report is read, every suggestion is considered, and the best ones land in updates like the ones below.

Keep crushing cities. 💥

entries.title: 🛒 New in the Store
entries.body:
🛡 CITY INSURANCE — restore 50% of destroyed buildings on next login.
🏗 PREMIUM PLOT — +25% income from every building, permanent.
🚀 ROCKET PACKS — Starter (10×), Elite (5× VIP), Apocalypse (12× VIP).
🛰 DEFENSE PACKS — Patriot (10× Mk I) and Shield Wall (5× Mk III).
🎰 DAILY SPIN REROLL — skip the 24h cooldown.

entries.title: 🕊 Peace Pact + Shield Fix
entries.body: NEW PLAYERS are now auto-protected for 25 minutes — no more first-session griefing. The paid Spawn Protect gamepass also actually blocks incoming attacks now (it didn't before — paying customers were locked out of attacking AND still being killed). Refunds may apply for anyone who bought it pre-fix.

entries.title: 🚀 Buy Your First Rocket coaching
entries.body: After your tutorial kill, the SHOP button pulses gold with a 'TAP SHOP TO BUY A ROCKET' arrow. No more wondering what to do next.

entries.title: 📱 Bigger Mobile UI
entries.body: Hotbar slots are 40% bigger on phones (no more 31px microscope mode). The country picker now has a 'Pick Later' button so you can dive straight into the game.
